ModMetaData.name: Geist Xenotype
ModMetaData.author: Sovereign
ModMetaData.description: A race of faceless assassins, their genome refined over the centuries by competing geist clans. They're nimble, silent, and deadly, with genetically-instilled sense of duty that ensures complete dedication to their mission - and that any failure is deeply regretted. Geists strike unseen, hidden in the mist produced by their smoke glands, with an impossible precision granted by the electroreceptors embedded within the faceplates of their featureless skulls. However, the same ability that sharpens their senses makes them uniquely vulnerable to electromagnetic currents, able to be felled with a single concentrated burst of EMP.
